start.title: The Forest's Edge
start.text: You stand at the edge of a mysterious forest. Ancient trees tower above you, their branches intertwined to form a canopy so thick that only scattered beams of sunlight reach the forest floor. A worn path disappears into the shadows ahead, while to your left, you notice strange glowing flowers that seem to pulse with their own inner light.

choices.text: Follow the worn path deeper into the forest
Turn back - this place feels too dangerous

deep_forest.title: Into the Heart of Mystery
deep_forest.text: The path winds deeper into the forest, and you notice the air growing cooler and more mysterious. Strange sounds echo from the darkness between the trees. Suddenly, you come across a fork in the path - one way leads to what looks like ruins of an ancient temple, while the other descends toward the sound of running water.

choices.text: Follow the path to the water source

magic_flowers.title: The Enchanted Garden
magic_flowers.text: As you approach the glowing flowers, you feel a warm, tingling sensation. These are healing blossoms - rare magical plants that can restore vitality. You carefully pick a few, feeling your strength renewed. But as you do, you hear a gentle voice warning you that taking too much magic from the forest comes with a price.

choices.text: Take only what you need and continue respectfully
Gather as many flowers as possible
